common.tagline: One QR code for your entire restaurant

home.title: One QR code for everything
home.subtitle: Menu, reviews, Instagram, WhatsApp, payments, and reservations — all in one beautiful mobile page your guests will love.

form.title: Restaurant setup

form.linksHint: Add up to 7 links. Empty fields won't show on your page.

espresso.description: Single-origin blend, served with sparkling water

showcase.title: See everything your guests get
showcase.subtitle: Explore the full restaurant experience — landing page, photo menu, and owner dashboard — in any of 10 languages.
showcase.guestSubtitle: What diners see when they scan your QR code
showcase.ownerSubtitle: Manage links, colors, and download your QR code

landing.title: Landing page
landing.description: Clean mobile hub with your logo, brand color, and one-tap buttons for every action.

menu.title: Photo menu
menu.description: Beautiful dish cards with photos, descriptions, and prices — no PDF needed.

menuDetail.title: Menu categories
menuDetail.description: Organize starters, mains, desserts, and drinks across easy-to-browse pages.

dashboard.title: Owner dashboard
dashboard.description: Edit everything in one place, copy your public link, and download print-ready QR codes.

table.title: Table QR (Pro)
table.description: Each table gets a QR — guests order or call staff with the table number sent to your kitchen.

showcase.featuresSubtitle: Seven essential actions, one beautiful page

featureDescriptions.menu: Hosted photo menu or link to your existing menu
featureDescriptions.googleMaps: Send happy guests straight to your Google review page
featureDescriptions.instagram: Grow followers with a direct link to your profile
featureDescriptions.whatsapp: Let guests message you for orders and questions
featureDescriptions.tip: Let guests leave a tip via Stripe, Revolut, or your preferred platform
featureDescriptions.reservation: Fill tables with your booking platform link

showcase.languagesSubtitle: Switch between 10 languages instantly — perfect for tourist areas and diverse neighborhoods.

dashboard.title: Owner dashboard preview
dashboard.banner: Demo mode — changes are not saved
dashboard.saveDisabled: Saving is disabled in demo mode
dashboard.tableQrHint: One QR per table — guests order or call staff directly to your kitchen WhatsApp.

guide.title: Guide for restaurant owners
guide.subtitle: Everything you need to set up your QR page, manage links, and impress your guests — in under 5 minutes.

create.title: Create your page
create.description: Add your restaurant name, logo URL, brand color, and default language. No account needed — you get a private dashboard link instantly.

dashboard.title: Your private dashboard
dashboard.description: Bookmark the dashboard URL with your secret token. From here you edit links, download your QR code, and copy your public page URL.
dashboard.editHint: Edit links, colors, and language anytime.

links.title: Add your links
links.description: Paste URLs for menu, Google reviews, Instagram, WhatsApp, payments, tips, and reservations. Only filled fields appear as buttons on your page.

menu.title: Photo menu (demo)
menu.description: Show guests a beautiful menu with dish photos and prices — or link to your existing PDF or website. Hosted menus are a Pro upgrade coming soon.

print.title: Print and place your QR
print.description: Download the QR from your dashboard and place it on tables, windows, receipts, and signage. Guests scan once and get everything.

pro.title: Pro features
pro.subtitle: Upgrade when you are ready to grow.

tableQr.title: Table QR ordering
tableQr.description: Each table gets its own QR. Guests send orders, call the waiter, or request the bill — straight to your kitchen WhatsApp with the table number included.

analytics.title: Analytics & custom domain
analytics.description: See scan counts, use your own domain, and unlock custom branding.
